documentation.file_docstring: Twitch outbound adapter for sending messages. Implements the ChannelOutboundAdapter interface for Twitch chat. Supports text and media (URL) sending with markdown stripping and chunking.
inline_comments: Twitch outbound adapter. Handles sending text and media to Twitch channels with automatic markdown stripping and message chunking.

Resolve target from context. Handles target resolution with allowlist support for implicit/heartbeat modes. For explicit mode, accepts any valid channel name. @param params - Resolution parameters @returns Resolved target or error
If target is provided, normalize and validate it
For implicit/heartbeat modes with allowList, check against allowlist
For explicit mode, accept any valid channel name
No target and no allowFrom - error

Send a text message to a Twitch channel. Strips markdown if enabled, validates account configuration, and sends the message via the Twitch client. @param params - Send parameters including target, text, and config @returns Delivery result with message ID and status @example const result = await twitchOutbound.sendText({ cfg: openclawConfig, to: "#mychannel", text: "Hello Twitch!", accountId: "default", });

Send media to a Twitch channel. Note: Twitch chat doesn't support direct media uploads. This sends the media URL as text instead. @param params - Send parameters including media URL @returns Delivery result with message ID and status @example const result = await twitchOutbound.sendMedia({ cfg: openclawConfig, to: "#mychannel", text: "Check this out!", mediaUrl: "https://example.com/image.png", accountId: "default", });

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: api, business_logic, logging
